attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_COUNTRY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_REGION, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_CITY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_JOB_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.EMPLOYEE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.MANAGER_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.MANAGER_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.BILLABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.UTILIZATION_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.SCHEDULABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_PERSON_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM,
 (
 select PERSON_ID ,RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM
 minus
 select PERSON_ID ,RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.PERSON_ID = STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.PERSON_ID and ACM.RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE=STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.RESOURCE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCES_DENORM.REFRESH_DATETIME
